title: stimoryne integrifolia subsp. inflata
intro: Stimoryne integrifolia subsp. inflata, also known as inflated leaf-stemmed Stimoryne, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Stimoryne integrifolia subsp. inflata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
